positive: A majestic bioluminescent fox silhouette amidst a grouping of stylized mountain peaks and flowering celestial lotus pads. The style should be a modern, vector-illustration aesthetic with high contrast and clean line work, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be central, focusing the fox in a dynamic, watchful pose against a stylized gradient background of deep indigo, emerald green, and luminous sapphire blue. The lighting effect should mimic glowing magical sources (luminescence) originating from the flora and the fox's outline. Graphic design quality, flat graphic elements mixed with subtle glow effects, symmetrical balance, isolated print design, minimalist yet detailed.
negative: blur, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, border, realistic photo, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, complex background, clutter
